ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Full name of the academic unit */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the unit belongs to */,
  "school" TEXT /* School or college the unit is part of */,
  "unit_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the academic unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the academic unit */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the academic unit was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the enrollment term */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the registration period for the term */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the registration period for the term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the enrollment term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment data point */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic unit */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment term */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of enrolled students */,
  "funding_allocation" TEXT /* Amount of funding allocated to the academic unit for the term */,
  "target_enrollment" INTEGER /* Target number of students to be enrolled in the academic unit for the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES academic_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES enrollment_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critical_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critical date */,
  "date_name" TEXT /* Name of the critical date */,
  "date_description" TEXT /* Description of the critical date */,
  "date" TEXT /* The actual date */,
  "date_type" TEXT /* Type of critical date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_by_date" (
  "enrollment_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment data point on a critical date */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic unit */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the critical date */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of enrolled students on the critical date */,
  "enrollment_target" INTEGER /* Target number of students to be enrolled on the critical date */,
  "enrollment_variance" INTEGER /* Variance between actual and target enrollment on the critical date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_by_date_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES academic_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_by_date_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES critical_dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic unit offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits offered by the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES academic_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment data point */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment term */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "waitlist_count" INTEGER /* Number of students on the waitlist for the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES enrollment_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollment" (
  "student_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student enrollment data point */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment term */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES enrollment_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "instructor_type" TEXT /* Type of instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "instructor_role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
